headline: VERAXA Biotech Shows Regulatory Progress on Cancer Therapy Platform
summary: By Daniella Parra VERAXA Biotech said it received positive scientific advice from Germany’s Paul-Ehrlich-Institute supporting a preclinical development plan for its experimental BiTAC-TCE cancer therapy platform. The feedback provides greater regulatory clarity and reduces some early-stage development risk as the company advances its lead candidate toward clinical trials, it said.
